reforms.description: The government intends to extend existing facilities for vocational training, aiming to establish special training centres to train approximately 2,000 workers per annum by 1971.
reforms.growth_orientation_rationale: Enhancing vocational training will increase the skill level of the workforce, thereby supporting productivity and economic growth.
reforms.status_evidence: It is intended to extend the levy-grant system to cover all manufacturing industries.
reforms.importance_rationale: The initiative represents a significant effort to improve workforce skills, which is crucial for industrial development and competitiveness.
reforms.source_quote: Greater efforts will be made in the course of the Third Programme to extend existing facilities for vocational training; the aim is to have sufficient special training centres in operation by 1971 to train about 2,000 workers per annum.
